_readme: v7 + 소급 타이밍 전수 검증 확정
title: You couldn't help me with ~, could you?
expression: You couldn't help me with ~, could you?

sentences.en: ★ You couldn't help me with an incredibly important decision, could you?
sentences.ko: ★ 엄청나게 중요한 결정 하나 도와줄 수 없을까?

sentences.en: Is this important in comparison to, let's say, whether they should cancel Third World debt?
sentences.ko: 그게 이를테면 제3세계 부채 탕감 같은 문제에 비할 만큼 중요한 거야?

sentences.en: That's right. I am at last going out on a date with the great Janine, and I just wanna be sure I've picked the right T-shirt.
sentences.ko: 맞아. 드디어 그 위대한 재닌이랑 데이트하거든. 티셔츠를 제대로 골랐는지 확실히 해두고 싶어서.
